title: Price question handled then continues
description: Prospect asks about the price. Dana explains customization factors without quoting a price and returns to screening.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Hi, this is Alex with American Beneficiary. I was checking if you're still open to looking at final expense options.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Pricing depends on your age, state, and the coverage you choose. A licensed agent can go over exact plan options with you. Just to see what options we have for you, how old are you?
